name: piper-morgan
description: Product management assistant that brings calibrated PM skills into Claude. After a short onboarding interview it builds a profile — your work style, priorities, and context — and uses it to power sprint planning, stakeholder updates, feature proposals, and more.

piper_base_url.title: Piper Morgan Server URL
piper_base_url.description: URL of your Piper Morgan server. Use https://alpha.pipermorgan.ai for the hosted alpha, or http://localhost:8001 if running locally.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key. Required when connecting to the hosted server so LLM costs stay on your account.

tools.name: ask_piper
tools.description: Send a product management question to Piper Morgan and get a profile-aware response

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Retrieve your PM profile stored in Piper Morgan

tools.name: save_profile
tools.description: Save or update your PM profile in Piper Morgan

tools.name: get_company_profile
tools.description: Retrieve your company context stored in Piper Morgan

tools.name: save_company_profile
tools.description: Save or update your company context in Piper Morgan

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Store the shared Piper Morgan alpha password so ask_piper can authenticate with the hosted server. Run this once after installing the plugin.

notes.status: privacy_policies URL (pipermorgan.ai/privacy) must exist before submission. Clean-machine test still needed.
